response.justification: Candidate has roughly 15 years of solid full-stack and infrastructure engineering experience with strong craftsmanship credentials, but the role is a Director-level IC focused on AI strategy and recognized AI expertise, which the resume does not demonstrate. AI exposure is limited to recent MCP/agent tooling work, with no AI products, platforms, research, or advanced degree to support a Principal/strategy-level position.
strengths: ~15 years of broad software and infrastructure engineering experience
Polyglot full-stack background with TDD and craftsmanship focus
Some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling
concerns: No recognized AI expertise or AI products/platforms built
No Master's/PhD in AI and no demonstrated AI research depth
No evidence of Director-level IC influence, strategy work, or advising strategic customers
